purpose: Full-pipeline bench harness: run the whole agileteam pipeline per task per arm, build real code, measure the BUILT increment with a deterministic mutation oracle. Faithful counterpart to bench-core-v1 (which probes single agents on test plans).
status: INSTRUMENT BUILT — NOT YET EXECUTED. Full execution is millions of tokens; requires explicit go-ahead.
primary_metric: escaped_defect_rate (mutation-not-caught by the arm's own tests on the built increment)
coder_note: Coder prompt is IDENTICAL across arms — the only variable is the DNA-differing agents (tester, code-reviewer, production-validator, product-owner, requirements-analyst, spec-auditor).

tasks.dark_zone: SEPARABLE partial-failure rollback — the happy path does NOT cover it (the hard task, built to defeat 'build forces the guarding test')

test_runner: /home/dyai/clawd/hive-backlog/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q  (any pytest-capable interpreter; scaffolds are stdlib-only)
